view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The evidence does not provide sufficient information to validate the expected outcome of the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario of running a consolidated report for multiple clients. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or outcomes from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected behavior was achieved. The lack of concrete results or traces means that we cannot determine if the scenario behavior is supported or if it leads to a failure report, thus making the validation inconclusive.
